title: cyathea atrovirens
intro: Cyathea atrovirens, also known as the Australian black tree fern, is a species of tree fern native to eastern Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Cyathea atrovirens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Cyathea atrovirens can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used as a tincture or powder in herbal remedies.
